title: feuilleea retusa
intro: Feuilleea retusa, also known as the "Dollar Bush" due to its round, coin-like leaves, is a small shrub native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The leaves and stems of Feuilleea retusa are rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, providing health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
